`y = c4 / (1 + exp(-c0 * C^c1 * (t - c2 * C^(-c3)))) + c5`

The current solution (score 0.8968) uses an exponential approach model which performs poorly. I should replace it with the proven best-performing model from the context solutions, which has complexity 25 and nmse_val ~0.0047.

The goal is to match or exceed the top solutions. Let me implement the exact same winning formula that achieves 0.9954.
